data.review: Best t-shirt I've ever owned. The fabric is incredibly soft and the fit is perfect. Will definitely be buying more.
Great quality but runs slightly large. I'd recommend sizing down.
The black one goes with everything. Already ordered two more colors.
The gold buttons really elevate this polo. Got compliments the first time I wore it.
Nice shirt but the fit is a bit boxy for my taste. Quality is excellent though.
Perfect Oxford shirt. The slim fit is exactly what I was looking for.
Great jeans. The stretch makes them super comfortable for all-day wear.
Finally, jeans that fit well off the rack. The indigo color is beautiful.
My new favorite chinos. The stretch cotton is game changing.
Absolute stunner of a jacket. The leather quality is phenomenal and the fit is spot on.
Most comfortable sneakers I own. Worth every penny.
A stunning timepiece. The gold accent matches VALOR's aesthetic perfectly.
